question: Help me composite my best friend (Image 2) and my solo photo (Image 1) into this snowy mountain background (Image 3), making her look like she's sitting on the snow and leaning against my legs. The lighting should look natural, as if taken on a bright sunny day.

I work in e-commerce. Please place this perfume bottle (Image 1) in the center of the silk background (Image 3), then disassemble these white roses (Image 2) and scatter the petals and individual blooms around the perfume bottle. Use high-end commercial photography lighting.

I want to create a surrealist wallpaper. Scale up this pocket watch (Image 1) to the size of a mountain and place it in the desert (Image 3), then have this blue whale (Image 2) leap out of the sand, arcing over the pocket watch, with that dreamy Tyndall light effect.

Composite this embarrassingly dramatic photo of me holding a broom (Image 1) into this wasteland city (Image 3), replace the broom with this lightsaber (Image 2), and have the lightsaber cast light onto my face and clothes, creating a cinematic movie poster feel.

Create an extreme sports blockbuster shot. Place this skier (Image 1) above the cliff (Image 3), as if they just jumped out of the helicopter (Image 2). The helicopter should be in the background, the rotor blades should have motion blur, and there should be special effects of snow being whipped up.

Transform this raw steak (Image 1) into a sizzling medium-rare pan-seared steak in the cast iron skillet (Image 2), garnished with rosemary and garlic (Image 3) on the side. Include frying smoke and an appetizing caramelized crust.

Prank my friend. Cut him out from this sleeping photo (Image 1), composite him into the starry sky background (Image 3), then place this UFO (Image 2) directly above him. Create a light beam effect as if he's being abducted, with his entire body floating upside down in mid-air.

I'm renovating and want to preview the result. Place this bed (Image 2) against the wall in this empty room (Image 1), then hang this painting (Image 3) on the wall above the headboard. Ensure the bed's perspective aligns with the floor, and the painting should cast a shadow on the wall.

I want to modify my car. Help me replace the wheels on this car (Image 1) with the style from Image 2, then add the carbon fiber rear spoiler from Image 3 to the back. Also change the body color to matte black while you're at it. It needs to look completely seamless.

Create a deep-sea exploration image. Place the diver (Image 1) beside the shipwreck (Image 2), with him shining a diving torch toward the wreck. Surround them with these bioluminescent jellyfish (Image 3). The overall color tone should be a deep, dark abyssal blue.

Dress this model (Image 1) in this floral dress (Image 2) and this straw hat (Image 3), and change the background to a sunny beach. The hem of the dress should appear to be gently lifted and flowing as if blown by the sea breeze.

Create a fairy tale photo for my daughter. Place her (Image 1) into this glowing magical forest (Image 3), then put this little dragon (Image 2) in the palm of her hands. The dragon should be looking at her, and they should have eye contact with each other.

Composite the guitarist (Image 1) and the drummer (Image 2) into this abandoned warehouse (Image 3), creating the atmosphere of an underground band rehearsal. Position the drummer in the back and the guitarist in the front, and add some vintage film grain along with overhead spotlight effects.

Create a time-travel themed creative image. Place the Terracotta Warrior (Image 1) inside the museum display case (Image 3), but have him holding this smartphone (Image 2) and taking a selfie, with the Terracotta Warrior's face visible on the screen.

Composite a wildlife photography masterpiece. Place the eagle (Image 1) above the rapid river (Image 3), with its talons just grabbing the salmon (Image 2). The water surface should convey a freeze-frame sensation of water splashing everywhere, and the eagle's feathers must be extremely sharp.

Place this Christmas tree (Image 1) in a cozy wooden cabin corner, then have this cat (Image 2) poking its head out from inside this gift box (Image 3), with its paws pawing at the string lights beneath the Christmas tree. The scene should have a warm color tone.

Help me extract these images and composite them into a realistic candid shot: Use the park pathway photo as the background. Place the man in the dark blue jacket on the left foreground of the frame, body turned slightly to the right, right hand resting on the handlebars of the red vintage bicycle; place the Corgi sitting inside the wicker basket, with the dog facing the camera and tongue sticking out. Ensure the person's feet and bicycle tires are strictly grounded on the flagstone path, add ground contact shadows and some dappled tree shadows according to the afternoon lighting direction in the background, with no white fringing on edges. Make the overall result look like it was taken with a single smartphone: unified color temperature, slight grain, consistent depth of field, with the distant background slightly blurred but subjects remaining sharp; no extra people or a second dog should appear.

I want to create a sophisticated-looking group photo as if taken in a museum: Use the museum hall image as the base. Place the woman in the red dress standing in the right-center midground, body facing left but looking at the camera. Position the Shiba Inu in the lower-left foreground, closer to the camera, with proper scale so it doesn't look like a toy. Place the blue-and-white porcelain vase in the background near the right-side column, slightly occluded by the column for a more realistic placement. The most critical aspect is the floor reflection: All three subjects must have reflections on the polished black marble, with reflections fading in intensity and becoming slightly blurred with distance. Also add very thin contact shadows at the feet/paws to prevent a floating appearance. Unify all lighting to match the cool overhead skylight feel, tone down the highlights on the red dress to prevent clipping, and add a subtle film grain to make it look like an authentic wide-angle photograph. Also, remove those two visitors in the background without leaving any smudging artifacts.

Composite these images into a single documentary-style photograph as if taken inside a greenhouse: Use the greenhouse corridor as the background, place the man wearing the straw hat standing in the center of the frame along the corridor, feet planted on the cement floor; right hand naturally holding the brass watering can with the spout pointing downward to the left; place the Blue-and-Yellow Macaw on his left shoulder, talons must realistically grip the apron strap, feather edges should be clean with a slight rim light from the overhead lighting. Unify lighting and shadows according to the greenhouse roof sunlight: soften the shadows on the person's face, the watering can should display striped specular reflections of the roof metal framework, overall warm tones with subtle atmospheric haze (dust particles in the light beams should not blur into fog). Finally, unify grain and sharpness so the person, bird, and metal watering can all appear as if captured by the same camera, with no composited edge artifacts.

I want to create a composite photo of a station departure scene, please follow the layout sketch: Use the high-speed rail station hall image as the background. Place the short-haired woman in the right foreground, body walking toward the right but head turned looking back at the camera; place the man with glasses in the left mid-ground following along, with his left hand holding a leash (the leash should have a natural slack curve, not a straight line). Position the Border Collie between the two people toward the front, as if walking along with them, all four legs must be grounded on the floor, not floating. The woman's right hand is pulling the black suitcase, the suitcase wheels must be touching the ground with slight motion blur added along the walking direction, and add realistic contact shadows and subtle reflections on the ground (reflections should not be as strong as a mirror). Unify the overall color tone to match the station's cool-toned overhead lighting, shadow directions for the people and dog must be consistent; remove any passersby from the background, leaving no ghosting or smudge marks.

Composite these into a photo that looks like it was taken inside an aquarium tunnel: use the glass tunnel as the background, first remove those visitors from the background, keeping only the empty walkway and glass structure. Place the boy in the center-front of the frame with his feet planted on the walkway floor; have him hold the plush rabbit against his chest with both hands (arms should naturally wrap around the toy without clipping). Place the manta ray in the water outside the glass, swimming past from above—the size should feel imposing yet still realistic, with edges showing some underwater particles and slight motion blur. Focus on creating realistic glass relationships: the manta ray must appear to be outside the glass, not like a sticker; the blue ambient light from the glass should affect the boy and the toy, but the boy's skin tone should not turn gray or green; glass reflection highlight streaks should naturally overlay the upper portion of the frame, slightly brushing the hair edges to look more like an on-location shot. Finally, unify noise and sharpness so the entire image looks like it was captured with the same camera.

Composite an advertisement-quality yet realistic action shot of a ski resort: Use the wide-angle ski resort shot as the background; following the sketch, place the snowboarder in the orange shell jacket in the left-front area of the frame, retaining the snow spray from the turn; place the Husky running on the right side of the frame chasing him, with some snow powder splashing at the dog's feet and continuous footprints left on the snow surface. Place the stainless steel insulated tumbler in the lower-right foreground, making it appear half-buried in the snow with compression marks at the snow edges, and the metallic reflections on the tumbler body must be converted to reflect the ski resort environment (not the black background reflections from the studio shot). All shadows should follow a single sun direction: the person, dog, and tumbler must all have clear but clean cast shadows, with snow surface shadows tending toward light blue. Finally, unify the depth of field: the foreground tumbler slightly sharp, the subjects sharp, the background more blurred; add a subtle amount of realistic noise and contrast overall, with no extra limbs or distortions.

Please composite these into a photo that looks like it was actually shot in the desert: Use the wide-angle sand dune image as the background. Place the vintage Jeep in the middle ground on the right side of the frame, with the wheels pressed into the sand surface leaving continuous tire tracks; position the photographer in the left foreground kneeling on one knee shooting toward the right at the camel, with the camera and hand direction properly aligned; place the camel in the center-left of the middle ground facing right, with proportions that reflect realistic distance relationships (not like a toy). Completely remove all traces of city buildings from the vehicle image, and change the car body reflections to match the desert environment, eliminating any cool-toned highlights from the asphalt road. Add appropriate footprints and knee imprints on the sand surface, unify all shadows to match a sun direction from the upper left; add subtle heat wave distortion in the distance and slight atmospheric haze to make the overall image feel more like a hot desert. Finally, perform unified color grading: warm tones but without over-reddening skin tones, consistent grain and sharpening.

Composite the mechanic, motorcycle, and toolbox into the tidy garage background to create a photo that looks like it was taken at an actual repair scene: Position the motorcycle center-right in the frame with tires firmly grounded and subtle reflections on the floor; the mechanic stands on the left side of the motorcycle, leaning slightly forward as if inspecting the handlebars or instrument panel, her right hand should appear to genuinely be near the handlebar (no floating), the wrench can remain in her hand but should not look exaggerated. Place the red toolbox open in the lower-left foreground, with tools inside clearly visible but without strange duplication artifacts. Unify all lighting and shadows under cool white overhead lighting: Match shadow direction and hardness across all elements, and transform the motorcycle's metal specular highlights to reflect the garage environment; finally, apply an overall desaturation with cool tones, add slight grain, and clean up edges to eliminate any cutout aliasing.

Composite a rooftop dusk lifestyle photo for me: Use the rooftop sunset image as the background, place the curly-haired woman in the foreground on the left side of the frame according to the sketch, have her hands on the telescope as if adjusting focus (hands and telescope must have realistic contact, not floating). Place the black telescope tripod to the front-left of her, with the tripod feet firmly planted on the cement ground; place the pine tree bonsai on the side table on the right side of the frame, ensure the bonsai is not cropped off. Unify all lighting and shadows to sunset backlighting: The person and telescope should have golden rim light from the right side, with long shadows cast on the ground in consistent directions; the person's original flat midday lighting needs to be converted to dusk contrast and color temperature. Finally, add slight sharpening plus a small amount of noise like smartphone night mode, but do not blur, extract edges cleanly without white or black fringing.

Composite the person, cat, stand mixer, and glass bowl into the bright kitchen background to create a candid shot of a baking process: the man stands on the left side of the frame near the countertop, with the whisk in his hands positioned directly above the glass bowl as if about to start whipping; place the glass bowl slightly toward the front edge of the countertop with perspective aligned to the countertop edge lines, the bowl should have transparent refraction and rim highlights. Place the white stand mixer left of center on the countertop with lighting direction consistent with the background window light, avoiding an e-commerce white-background look. Place the orange cat lying on the countertop on the right side near the window, add a bit of flour near its front paws leaving two or three very shallow paw prints (don't exaggerate), and keep the cat fur edges sharp without blur. Unify the cat's originally cool window light and the person's warm overhead lighting into the kitchen's natural window light: overall slightly warm but clean; finally add a touch of realistic grain and subtle depth of field so the countertop foreground is sharp and the background cabinets are slightly soft, avoid extra fingers or strange utensils.

Composite the photographer, tripod, and deer into the forest clearing background to create a highly realistic wildlife photography moment: place the tripod in the left foreground close to the camera, with its feet pressing into the grass showing small indentation shadows; position the photographer in the left mid-ground, changed to a crouching/half-crouching pose, looking through the camera viewfinder aimed at the deer (if pose adjustment is needed, preserve the clothing and facial features as much as possible, just keep the movement natural). Place the sika deer in the right mid-ground, standing in the background's dappled light area, scaled to reflect realistic distance. The key focus is dappled light: apply similar foliage light patterns to the photographer and tripod as well, integrating all subjects into the same lighting environment; also use those fern fronds from the foreground to slightly occlude a small portion of the tripod, adding spatial depth. Finally, unify the depth of field: foreground foliage slightly blurred, mid-ground subjects sharp, background forest more blurred; add a small amount of natural noise overall, keep edges from becoming soft.

Composite the two people and the laptop into the conference room glass table background to look like an authentic on-site meeting photo: following the sketch, place the woman on the left and the man on the right, both seated at the glass table with bodies oriented toward each other, gazes directed at the laptop in the center or at each other—avoid blank stares into the distance. Place the laptop in the center-front of the table with perspective aligned to the table edges; the line chart on screen may be retained but avoid garbled text or extraneous windows. Focus on glass table reflections: the lower portions of the laptop and both people (arms/sleeve edges) should have natural reflections on the table surface, with reflection intensity weaker than the actual objects and slightly blurred; simultaneously, arms must have contact shadows to avoid appearing to float above the table. Unify the studio portrait lighting with the conference room's cool white overhead lights: moderately reduce contrast and add some ambient fill light so skin tones appear natural but cool-toned; finally, match grain and sharpness uniformly, avoiding extra fingers or distortion.

Composite the ceramic artist, pottery wheel, and cat into the pottery studio background to create an authentic on-site photo of pottery making in progress: place the pottery wheel in the center-front of the frame, with its base resting on the cement floor and casting a contact shadow; position the ceramic artist behind the pottery wheel, leaning forward, with her hands appearing to genuinely shape the clay on both sides (correct finger count, no distortion). The turntable should have slight motion blur from rotation, but the main clay body should remain clear with visible texture; add a small amount of fine clay splatter around the apron and turntable, but not too much. Place the black and white cat on the wooden shelf in the right rear, slightly soft to match the depth of field. Unify the overall lighting to warm window light from the left: ensure consistent highlight direction on the person and pottery wheel, with coherent shadows; finally, unify grain, sharpness, and color temperature, clean up edges to avoid any compositing jaggies.

Composite the girl, horse, and red wagon into the farm yard background, creating a candid shot as if actually playing in the yard: Place the girl in the left foreground, right hand gripping the wagon handle pulling toward the back right; place the red wagon slightly to the right behind her, wheels must rest on the dirt road, add wheel tracks and a subtle fine dust effect but not resembling smoke. Place the black horse in the midground near the fence, extending its head toward the girl as if sniffing her; the horse's head can be partially occluded by the fence, occlusion must be realistic without clipping artifacts. Convert the wagon from the white-background product photo to match the farm environment lighting: unify the highlight direction on the wagon body, add contact shadow at the bottom; unify the shadows of the person and horse to a consistent sun direction. Finally, grade the overall colors warm, add a small amount of natural film grain to make it look like it was captured with the same camera, and avoid extra limbs or distorted proportions.

Composite the researcher, microscope, and green iguana into the clean laboratory workbench background, creating an on-site photo resembling science education photography: the person stands on the left side of the frame near the surface, keeping the safety goggles and blue gloves, right hand pointing toward the center of the surface; the microscope is placed center-left on the surface, its base must rest on the surface with contact shadows. Place the iguana on the right side of the surface, body lying flat, tail winding to the left following the sketch, scale details must be preserved—do not let them become blurry or plastic-looking. The key focus is lighting consistency: change the iguana's original warm lighting to laboratory cool white overhead lighting, shadow directions must be consistent across all three subjects; the surface can have very subtle reflections, but only a faint layer of shapes, not mirror-like. Also blur/mosaic any readable text on the person's ID badge to avoid garbled text appearing. Finally, unify grain and sharpness so it looks like it was captured with the same camera.

Please composite the watchmaker, grandfather clock, and grey parrot into the antique clock shop background, creating a realistic photo that looks like a casual snapshot taken inside the shop: The watchmaker sits at the workbench in the center of the frame, preserving the details of his magnifying loupe and the screwdriver in his hand; position the grandfather clock to his rear right near the display cabinet, height must match realistic proportions—do not shrink it to look like a small toy. Place the grey parrot perching on the top crossbeam of the clock, talons must realistically grip the wooden edge, feather edges clean. Focus on glass treatment: the clock's glass door should have reflective highlights from the shop's interior lighting while the brass pendulum bob inside remains faintly visible; reflection intensity should be natural—do not completely obscure the contents. Unify the overall look with warm yellow indoor lighting, tone down overly bright highlights, keep shadows soft; finally add subtle film grain, clean up edges, and avoid extra talons or strange clock components appearing.

Composite the surfer, drone, and seagull into the rocky beach background, following the sketch to make it look like an authentic seaside shot: Position the surfer near the waterline walking to the right, feet must be on the wet sand with slight footprint impressions, surfboard edges should be clean. Place the drone hovering in the sky ahead of him, slightly to the right, propellers should have slight rotational motion blur while the body remains sharp; it must cast a shadow on the sand with correct direction and plausible shape (based on sun from upper left). The seagull flies through from the upper-right of the frame, close to the drone but without overlapping or clipping through it, wingtips may have slight motion blur. Convert the drone from black studio lighting to bright seaside environment lighting: highlights should become more natural, reflections should shift toward sky blue, no residual black background reflections. Finally, unify the overall color grading and grain to look like a single camera shot, keep the horizon level, and do not introduce extra birds or a second drone.

Composite the two people and the dog into the park background, making them look like a family walking the dog; the woman should be crouching down to pet the dog, the man standing beside them watching and smiling; the overall result should look natural with unified lighting and shadows

I want to create a skincare advertisement image. Place the serum bottle slightly left of center, arrange the lemon slice and honeycomb on the right as ingredient display, scatter serum droplets around the bottle, change the overall background to a cream-colored gradient, it needs to have a premium feel, that magazine advertisement quality

Place all three small animals in the living room, with the white cat lying prone on the floor beside the coffee table, the orange cat jumping onto the coffee table (with a sense of being careful not to knock over the glass), and the black puppy tilting its head to look at the orange cat nearby; there should be a sense of interaction among the three animals

Composite an underwater photography masterpiece: the diver is photographing the sea turtle in front of the coral reef, the butterflyfish swimming past near the diver's shoulder, featuring underwater light and shadow effects, the entire image should have a blue-green color tone, resembling National Geographic magazine style

Composite the man next to the Ferrari with one hand resting on the car roof, replace the background with the street in front of that office building, reflections of both the car and person should be visible on the ground, the overall look should resemble an automotive magazine cover shot

Create a fantasy-style image for me: place all three small animals in the tropical rainforest, with the parrot flying mid-air with wings spread open, the chameleon perched on a hanging vine, and the chinchilla sitting on a large leaf as if riding a boat. The overall composition should have a magical forest atmosphere with dreamy lighting.

Composite these three Paralympic athletes onto the track, with the wheelchair athlete speeding forward in the nearest lane, the blade runner sprinting in the middle lane, and the visually impaired athlete running in the outer lane, all facing the same direction as if competing in a race, creating an inspiring and powerful composition, like a sports promotional poster

Help me composite an Instagram-style home still life photo: place the vase on the linen tablecloth, insert the dried flower bouquet into the vase, arrange the open book and glasses beside it, the overall feel should have natural light streaming in from the left, with warm tones and low saturation, slightly artistic

Composite a photo of the drone and bald eagle flying together in the same frame above the wheat field; the eagle flies through the left foreground of the frame, while the drone is positioned slightly farther away on the right side tracking it; the perspective should appear as if shot from the ground looking upward, with blue sky and white clouds as the background and the wheat field at the bottom of the frame

Composite the old craftsman into the workshop, have him sitting at the workbench carving the music box, with the music box placed on the table in front of him in an unfinished state (lid detached and placed beside it), conveying a sense of focused work, like a still frame from a documentary

Help me composite a Chinese-style portrait photo: the woman wearing the qipao standing on the stone bridge in the garden, holding the oil-paper umbrella with one hand resting on her shoulder, use the garden pavilion as the background, with a hazy aesthetic from the thin mist, and a more elegant and understated color tone

Create a surrealist-style composite image: beside the glacial lake, the elephant drinking water at the water's edge, the tiger crouching on the gravel beach, the Arctic fox standing on an ice floe, as if these three animals coexist in the same otherworldly realm, lighting should be unified, the image should have a cinematic feel

Create a photo full of childlike wonder and imagination for me: a little girl chasing a giant soap bubble in a sunflower field, with a blue butterfly reflected flying inside the bubble, the composition should be grand, with brilliant sunshine, like an award-winning entry from a children's photography competition

I want to create a creative composite image showcasing the entire pottery process: the potter throwing clay on the left, the wood-fired kiln firing in the middle (smaller as a background transition element), and the completed colorful ceramic bowls displayed on the tea room low table on the right, like a left-to-right timeline narrative. The image should flow cohesively without appearing too rigid

Place all three urban animals into the abandoned factory: the pigeon standing on an elevated iron beam, the squirrel foraging through the weeds on the ground, the cat lying down and napping in the mid-ground position, with sunlight streaming through the skylight falling directly onto the cat, creating a sense of 'a secret hideout for urban wildlife'

Create a composite image with an earthquake rescue theme: the firefighter stands on the debris with the search and rescue dog conducting a search, the firefighter points with her hand toward a gap ahead, the search and rescue dog is sniffing in that direction, a rescue helicopter circles in the distant sky overhead, the image should convey a sense of urgency and on-site realism

Place both cars on the desert highway for me, with the classic car in the left lane and the Tesla in the right lane, creating the feel of two cars driving side by side, as if shooting a 'Past vs. Future' cinematic comparison shot, with golden reflections from the sunset cast on the car bodies, conveying a sense of speed
